overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian cyberpunk city at night, starting from a covered parking area, proceeding along neon-lit streets under an overpass, and ending at the entrance of the Electric Corporation building. The scene features wet reflective pavement, foggy atmosphere, and prominent neon signage characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: exits covered parking garage onto open wet street

agents.ego_description: walking out of a covered parking area onto a neon-lit city street

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near a parked luxury car with blue underglow lighting

entered.detail: concrete parking structure with fluorescent ceiling lights
black sedan with distinctive blue neon underglow
tall concrete wall with vertical green and red neon strip lights
black and yellow striped traffic bollards

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered concrete parking area where two figures stand near a parked luxury car with blue underglow. The camera moves forward, passing bollards and exiting the sheltered space onto a wet street lined with a neon-lit wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a wet multi-lane road beneath a massive overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure spanning overhead
large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content
tall pole-mounted floodlights illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: Walking down the center of a deserted multi-lane street under a massive concrete overpass. The wet asphalt reflects the green and red neon lights from the wall on the right and the streetlights overhead. Large digital billboards are visible in the distance through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate facility entrance with security perimeter

events.description: turns left at intersection toward the Electric Corporation building

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and approaching the corporate building entrance

entered.detail: large industrial building with prominent white neon signage reading ELECTRIC CORPORATION
metal security fence with warning signs blocking the entrance
red sports car parked near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the intersection, the camera approaches the Electric Corporation building, a large industrial facility with bright white neon signage. A security gate blocks the entrance, and a red car is parked nearby. The overpass and neon wall recede from view as the camera focuses on the corporate entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete parking area into the neon-drenched expanse of a dystopian city street, ending at a corporate industrial entrance. It begins by passing two figures and a luxury car with blue underglow, moving past bollards to exit the covered space onto a wet street lined with a glowing neon wall. As the camera proceeds down the center of the deserted multi-lane road, the environment opens up under a massive concrete overpass where the asphalt reflects vibrant green and red lights amidst a hazy night air. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left at an intersection, leaving the overpass and neon wall behind to approach the Electric Corporation building. Finally, the view focuses on the facility's bright white neon signage and a security gate blocked by a parked red car.
